docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,543.33 FILED BY BERCZYNSKI, PAULINA SEELY, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT DEMICHEVA, LIDIYA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-02-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DEMICHEVA, LIDIYA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-03-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, AND DMV RECORDS INDICATE THE PLAINTIFF IS NOT THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE VEHICLE. THEREFORE, PLAINTIFF DOES NOT HAVE STANDING TO MAKE THIS CLAIM. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY 18, 2010 ORDERED DESTROYED.
